name: Ask questions about a PDF using AI
description: RAG-style Q&A pipeline: searches Google Drive for documents, retrieves their content, uses Claude AI to answer questions based on the document content, and posts the answer to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Ask questions about a PDF using AI

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key (used to access Google Drive files)

question.description: The question you want answered based on document content

searchTopic.description: Topic to search for relevant documents (e.g. 'bitcoin whitepaper', 'quarterly report 2024')

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Search for relevant documents via Exa
Compile document content for AI context
